'''Reytha Minor''' was a [[City/Legends|city]] on the agricultural [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Reytha]]. In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], it was captured by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], which established a stronghold inside the city walls. [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] subsequently led an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] strike force during the [[Reytha campaign]] to retake the city and raze the Rebel base.

==Behind the scenes==
Reytha Minor appears during the Darth Vader campaign in the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''. The campaign was also included in the game's [[2002]] expansion pack, [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns|''Clone Campaigns'']].
